title: craft for more than 2 weeks (cm2w)
description: attempting to make the 2-week Minecraft faze longer
body:
CM2W is a modpack that adds so much to the game it might make minecraft not minecraft anymore from new bosses, new structures, new combat, plus new biomes, adds quality of life features including performance mods, shader support, dynamic crosshair, essential mod for playing with your friends without a server and even replay mod for you content creators out there so what are you waiting for play today!
message me on discord if you need help or anything else @blurrrgaming. i plan to work on this in the future so bring any problem up to me on discord
